title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are out of date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is up to date
scenario: Language change on multi-component device causes earbuds to remain on outdated firmware while smart charge case updates to latest firmware
steps: Start app with device having multiple components on outdated firmware.
expected: Software update screen appears, language change and DFU complete successfully, all components updated to latest firmware, and language on smart charge case also changes.
